---
name: Feature Request
about: Propose a new capability for an agent, tool, or pipeline component
title: "[FEATURE] <agent-name>: <brief description>"
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Target Agent / Component

<!-- Which agent or component would this feature affect? -->
- [ ] orchestrator-agent
- [ ] planning-agent
- [ ] validation-agent
- [ ] security-agent
- [ ] execution-agent
- [ ] debugging-agent
- [ ] migration pipeline (ETL)
- [ ] Halcon observability
- [ ] New agent (describe below)
- [ ] Other: ___

## Problem Statement

<!-- Describe the problem or gap this feature would address.
     Be specific: what fails today, what is slow, what is unsafe? -->

## Proposed Solution

<!-- Describe the solution you have in mind.
     Include: new tools, changed prompts, new config options, new data models. -->

## Alternatives Considered

<!-- List any alternative approaches you evaluated and why you ruled them out. -->

## Compliance Impact

<!-- Assess the regulatory impact of this change. -->

**GDPR:**
- [ ] No impact on personal data processing
- [ ] New personal data field or processing purpose — DPA review required
- [ ] Data retention or deletion logic affected

**SOX:**
- [ ] No impact on financial data or audit trails
- [ ] Affects financial record processing — change control ticket required: ___
- [ ] Affects audit log integrity

**FedRAMP / FISMA:**
- [ ] No impact on federal data handling
- [ ] New external API call or data egress — security review required
- [ ] Affects CUI/PII handling or encryption

## Testing Approach

<!-- How would this feature be tested? Include:
     - Unit test strategy (which tools, which edge cases)
     - Integration test approach
     - Any failure scenarios to cover -->

## Halcon Metrics Impact

<!-- Would this change affect agent behavior measurable by Halcon?
     E.g., "Should reduce wasted_rounds because the agent will have better context upfront." -->

## Additional Context

<!-- Any other relevant information, links to prior art, or related issues. -->
<!-- Do NOT include real customer data, credentials, or production secrets. -->
